title: Move DC motor authoring from Motion keyframes to Sequencer lanes
description:
Design: docs/plans/2026-07-19-sequencer-dc-lanes-design.md

Phase 1 (browser only, no firmware change): optional per-step 'dc' map {boardId: speed} on sequence steps, clamped to +/-50. flattenDcLanes() emits targeted zero-duration ROTATE chord steps on change, driving both the bake path and the browser live sequence player. Three read-only DC lanes in the Arrange dialog. Remove dc from MOTION_TRACK_SPECS and the dead DC live-feasibility/throttle code.
